data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of a waitlist with priority bidding. However, the evidence provided only confirms that customers can enter a waitlist/queue flow, but does not demonstrate any mechanism for priority bidding among waitlisted customers. This indicates a clear gap in the requirement as the necessary functionality is not evidenced in the current implementation.
gaps: No evidence of priority bidding mechanism for waitlisted customers.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Implement priority bidding for waitlisted customers
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define the API behavior for priority bidding on the waitlist.
